title: Lost Saga
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/834f33f416078cb6b53afea30d33146b540ea7fe.png) Lost Saga plans to Minecraft feel more natural and down to earth. It was influenced by a lot of packs like Conquest_, Painterly, DokuCraft, and many others. As well as, games like The Witcher 3 and Red Dead Redemption 2. This pack is an early work in progress so everything is subject to change and many more things are planned to be added added over time.


### TO USE THE PACK AS INTENDED, INSTALL THE FOLLOWING MODS: **Polytone, Continuity, and Puzzle** and will likely require more mods in the future. I recommend using [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) for the best experience.
